category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Nicaragua.

title.en: China-to-Nicaragua EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入尼加拉瓜：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入尼加拉瓜：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Nicaragua MEM / INE / ENATREL electricity-sector expectations, NTON / DGCN-MIFIC standards context, 120/240 V 60 Hz grid adaptation, Americas connector ecosystem assumptions for SAE J1772 / CCS1, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC baselines, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与尼加拉瓜MEM / INE / ENATREL电力部门要求、NTON / DGCN-MIFIC标准环境、120/240 V 60 Hz电网适配、美洲地区SAE J1772 / CCS1接口生态假设、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC基线、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與尼加拉瓜MEM / INE / ENATREL電力部門要求、NTON / DGCN-MIFIC標準環境、120/240 V 60 Hz電網適配、美洲地區SAE J1772 / CCS1接口生態假設、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC基線、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Nicaragua, the practical gaps are grid adaptation to Nicaragua's Americas-style 120/240 V, 60 Hz supply, confirmation of site connection and distribution requirements with INE, ENATREL, DISNORTE or DISSUR as applicable, NTON / DGCN-MIFIC conformity routing, IEC 61851 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and hardware conversion away from GB/T 20234 connectors. The Americas EV ecosystem commonly uses SAE J1772 (Type 1) for AC and CCS1 for DC, but an official Nicaragua-wide connector mandate could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should confirm connector expectations with MEM / INE, the utility, project owner, and charge-point operator before quoting or shipping.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入尼加拉瓜时，实务差距包括：适配尼加拉瓜美洲体系120/240 V、60 Hz供电；按项目与INE、ENATREL、DISNORTE或DISSUR确认接入和配电要求；核实NTON / DGCN-MIFIC合格评定路径；准备IEC 61851 / IEC 61851-23安全证据、IEC 61000 EMC证据；并将GB/T 20234接口改为当地项目采用的硬件接口。美洲电动汽车生态通常采用交流SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流CCS1，但截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认尼加拉瓜全国统一接口强制规则；出口商应在报价或发货前向MEM / INE、公用事业单位、项目业主和充电点运营商确认接口要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入尼加拉瓜時，實務差距包括：適配尼加拉瓜美洲體系120/240 V、60 Hz供電；按項目與INE、ENATREL、DISNORTE或DISSUR確認接入和配電要求；核實NTON / DGCN-MIFIC合格評定路徑；準備IEC 61851 / IEC 61851-23安全證據、IEC 61000 EMC證據；並將GB/T 20234接口改為當地項目採用的硬體接口。美洲電動汽車生態通常採用交流SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流CCS1，但截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認尼加拉瓜全國統一接口強制規則；出口商應在報價或發貨前向MEM / INE、公用事業單位、項目業主和充電點運營商確認接口要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NTON applicability decision, customs determination, INE approval, MEM policy interpretation, ENATREL or distribution-utility grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify current Nicaragua conformity assessment rules, utility connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NTON适用范围裁定、海关裁定、INE批准、MEM政策解释、ENATREL或配电公司并网批准、电气安装设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行尼加拉瓜合格评定规则、公用事业接入要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NTON適用範圍裁定、海關裁定、INE批准、MEM政策解釋、ENATREL或配電公司併網批准、電氣安裝設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行尼加拉瓜合格評定規則、公用事業接入要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
